reasoning: Since no specific resolution dates are listed in the prompt, we assume the question close date (2026-02-07) acts as the resolution day for comparing against 2025-11-09. Based on historical climate data for Nancy-Ochey in France, the average daily mean temperature on November 9 is roughly 6.5°C (with a standard deviation around 3.5°C), while the average daily mean for February 7 is roughly 2.5°C (standard deviation around 4.5°C). The temperature difference (Feb 7 minus Nov 9) thus follows an approximate normal distribution with a mean of -4.0°C and a standard deviation of about 5.7°C (sqrt(3.5^2 + 4.5^2)). Evaluating the probability that this difference is strictly greater than zero yields P(Z > 4.0/5.7) = P(Z > 0.70), which is approximately 0.242, or 24%.
